mapper.sql: id, order_no, member_id, total_amount, actual_amount, discount_amount, shipping_fee, address_id, status, payment_method, payment_time, shipping_time, completion_time, cancel_time, cancel_reason, remark, created_at, updated_at
mapper.update: UPDATE `order` SET total_amount = #{totalAmount}, actual_amount = #{actualAmount}, discount_amount = #{discountAmount}, shipping_fee = #{shippingFee}, address_id = #{addressId}, status = #{status}, payment_method = #{paymentMethod}, payment_time = #{paymentTime}, shipping_time = #{shippingTime}, completion_time = #{completionTime}, cancel_time = #{cancelTime}, cancel_reason = #{cancelReason}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE `order` SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM `order` WHERE id = #{id} AND member_id = #{memberId}
